detection.rebuild_hint: If you made structural changes this session, call rebuild_index before your next sqry query.

tools.when: find immediate callers of the suspect function (one-hop)
find immediate callees of the suspect function (one-hop)
trace multi-level caller/callee chains when one-hop is insufficient
check if the bug site is in a circular dependency
find the call path from entry point to bug site
understand blast radius — what else breaks if this symbol is wrong
jump to the actual definition of a symbol referenced in stack traces
find all usages of a suspect symbol across the codebase
trace structural call paths from input handlers toward dangerous sinks (exec, eval, innerHTML, raw SQL)
map the full call tree from auth/authz entry points to verify coverage
detect circular dependencies that could cause infinite loops (DoS vectors)
find dead code that may contain old vulnerabilities or stale auth checks
flag high-complexity functions (cyclomatic >15) for manual security review
verify that security-critical functions are only called from trusted contexts
find all functions matching security-relevant patterns (auth*, sanitize*, validate*, escape*)
find FFI/HTTP boundaries where trust assumptions change
check cyclomatic complexity of changed files — flag regressions
check if changed symbols introduced or participate in cycles
analyze downstream impact of changed public APIs
catch newly-dead code after refactors or API changes
compare structural changes between the PR branch and base branch
verify callers of changed functions still work with the new signature

retro.context: structural code quality analysis for retrospective

tools.when: compare structural changes between this week's HEAD and last week's tag/commit
track complexity trends — are we adding or reducing complexity?
check if new cycles were introduced this week
get overall codebase health metrics for the retrospective dashboard

plan-eng-review.context: structural architecture analysis for plan review

tools.when: visualize module dependencies to validate architecture boundaries
extract the dependency neighborhood around components the plan modifies
verify dependency tree of modules the plan touches
check for existing cycles the plan should address or avoid
understand cross-language boundaries the plan must respect
verify no circular dependencies in shipped code
catch dead code being shipped
verify complexity hasn't regressed
